overall.description: First-person exploration of an offshore industrial oil rig platform at night. The player navigates through dark interior corridors and exterior walkways using a flashlight, revealing metal structures, safety railings, and industrial equipment against a backdrop of open ocean and night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior industrial corridor with yellow safety railings

events.description: approaching exit doorway leading to exterior platform

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through dark interior corridor, flashlight illuminating metal walkways and railings

entered.detail: bright yellow metal safety railings lining the walkway
industrial metal grating floor allowing visibility to lower levels
large structural steel beams supporting the ceiling
metal staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark interior corridor of an industrial facility. The player moves forward through a narrow passage with yellow safety railings and metal grating floors, illuminated only by the flashlight. The environment is enclosed with corrugated metal walls and structural beams visible in the shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior oil rig walkway with ocean view

events.description: exiting interior corridor onto exterior platform with open ocean visible
turning slightly right to follow the curved walkway along the platform edge

agents.ego_description: walking along exterior walkway, sweeping flashlight across metal trusses and the dark ocean beyond

entered.detail: dark open ocean visible beyond the platform edge
large diagonal metal truss beams supporting the platform
white painted metal safety railings along the walkway
red industrial equipment box or container

segments.scene_description: The player exits the interior into a semi-covered exterior walkway. The scene opens to reveal the dark ocean on the right and massive metal truss structures overhead. White safety railings line the path as the player follows the curved walkway, passing a red equipment container and sweeping the flashlight across the industrial pillars and open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper platform stairs and narrow equipment corridor

events.description: ascending metal stairs to upper platform level
entering narrow corridor between green industrial containers

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to upper level then proceeding through narrow passage between equipment

entered.detail: green painted metal container or equipment housing
vertical metal ladder attached to structure
yellow safety railings along the stairs and upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The player ascends metal stairs to an upper platform level, passing yellow safety railings. The environment transitions into a narrow corridor flanked by green metal containers and industrial equipment. The flashlight reveals metal ladders and grating floors as the player navigates the confined space with the ocean still visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper industrial deck with yellow pipes

events.description: emerging from narrow corridor onto upper deck with prominent yellow industrial pipes
turning right to follow the walkway alongside large yellow pipes

agents.ego_description: walking along upper industrial deck, examining yellow pipes and machinery with flashlight

entered.detail: large diameter yellow painted industrial pipes running along the deck
complex industrial machinery and valve assemblies
green painted industrial equipment or generator
silver metal safety railings along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an open upper industrial deck dominated by large yellow pipes running along the walkway. The flashlight illuminates green equipment and complex machinery against the dark ocean backdrop. The player follows the path alongside the pipes, navigating the elevated platform with metal railings visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic interior corridor out onto an expansive industrial walkway before ascending to a higher platform. It begins in a dark, narrow passage with corrugated metal walls and yellow safety railings, where the only light comes from a handheld flashlight reflecting off metal grating floors. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens into a semi-covered exterior walkway, revealing the dark ocean to the right and massive metal truss structures overhead. The path then curves past a red equipment container and industrial pillars before turning toward a set of metal stairs. Finally, the camera ascends to an upper level, transitioning into a confined corridor flanked by green metal containers and ladders while the open sea remains visible in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the viewer emerges from an interior space onto an expansive, dark industrial deck. It begins by stepping out into the open air, where a flashlight beam cuts through the night to reveal large yellow pipes lining the walkway. As the camera advances, the light shifts to illuminate green equipment and complex machinery set against the void of the surrounding ocean. The scene then follows the linear path of the elevated platform, gliding past metal railings and industrial conduits toward the far end of the deck.
